summary: Inspections Tab Enhancements - All 5 features fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs (17/18 tests passed), Frontend UI verified with all modals and interactions working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - This is a console warning in React dev mode, not affecting functionality

inspections_page_columns.details: All 8 columns present: Date/Time, Customer, Vehicle, Payment Status, Inspection Status, Mechanic, Location, Actions

collect_balance_button.details: Orange 'Collect ₹XXX' buttons appear for partial payment inspections (e.g., Collect ₹919, Collect ₹229, Collect ₹1,617)

collect_balance_modal.details: Modal shows customer name, mobile, package, vehicle, total amount, already paid, balance due, and 'Send Payment Link' button

collect_balance_api.details: POST /api/inspections/{id}/collect-balance generates Razorpay payment link and optionally sends WhatsApp

vehicle_edit_modal.details: Modal shows current vehicle, input for new vehicle number with 'Search' button for Vaahan API integration

vehicle_update_api.details: PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/vehicle updates car_number, car_make, car_model, car_year, car_color, fuel_type

inspection_status_dropdown.details: Dropdown in Inspection Status column with all 8 status options

status_options_complete.details: All statuses available: New Inspection, Assigned to Mechanic, Confirmed, Started, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled (Customer), Cancelled (Wisedrive)

status_update_api.details: PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/status updates inspection status with validation

mechanic_assignment_modal.details: Modal shows current mechanic, dropdown to select/reassign/unassign mechanic

mechanic_assignment_api.details: PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/assign-mechanic assigns/unassigns mechanic, auto-updates status to ASSIGNED_TO_MECHANIC

mechanics_list_api.details: GET /api/mechanics returns list of users with MECHANIC role

schedule_edit_modal.details: Modal shows date and time pickers with 'Update Schedule' button

vaahan_api_integration.details: GET /api/vehicle/details/{vehicle_number} fetches vehicle details from Vaahan API (Invincible Ocean)

test_classes: TestInspectionsEnhancements - 18 tests covering login, inspections list, status update, vehicle update, mechanic assignment, schedule update, collect balance, Vaahan API

critical_code_review_comments: InspectionsPage.jsx correctly implements all 5 enhancements with proper modals and data-testid attributes
Backend endpoints properly validate inputs and return appropriate error codes (400 for invalid status, 404 for not found)
Mechanic assignment auto-updates status to ASSIGNED_TO_MECHANIC when assigning to NEW_INSPECTION
Schedule update auto-updates status to SCHEDULED when updating from UNSCHEDULED
Collect Balance correctly validates payment_status before generating payment link
Vaahan API integration properly handles vehicle not found scenarios

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 tests passed, 1 skipped - no fully paid inspections for test)

seed_data_used: Existing inspection data with partial payments (Rahul - KA05NC8137 with ₹919 pending, Karthik - KA02NC9663 with ₹229 pending, Divya - KA01NC7581 with ₹1,617 pending)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 Inspections tab enhancements fully implemented and tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_inspections_enhancements.py covers all API scenarios. UI has proper columns, buttons, modals with data-testid attributes. Backend endpoints: PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/status, PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/vehicle, PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/assign-mechanic, PATCH /api/inspections/{id}/schedule

mocked_apis.note: Using real Razorpay, Twilio, and Vaahan API services
